import threading
import asyncio

background_thread = threading.Thread(target=lambda: None, daemon=True)
background_thread.start()

loop = asyncio.new_event_loop()
asyncio.set_event_loop(loop)


def run_background_task():
    import time

    while True:
        time.sleep(60)
        print("Background task running")


bg = threading.Thread(target=run_background_task, daemon=True)
bg.start()
